implementation.primarySubject: feat(world): 建立入口持续环境样板
implementation.finalFixSubject: fix(world): 恢复入口电影材质与结构降级
implementation.rendering: DOM and CSS custom properties through the single AmbientScheduler at no more than 30fps

visualReview.normalMode: The cinematic moon gate, cloud sea, floating islands and lamp roads remain the material layer; semantic routes and ongoing light cues align over it.
visualReview.backgroundHiddenMode: With the bitmap wrapper removed, a moon, three floating island bodies, three route lines, a distant lighthouse and three operable destinations remain distinguishable.
visualReview.mobileMode: The vertical moon gate and central destination remain visible; side destinations and fixed navigation fit without overlap.
visualReview.firstAttemptFailure: The opaque spatial base covered the cinematic asset and made normal mode look like a wireframe skeleton.
visualReview.correction: The final fix makes the spatial base transparent only while the image is healthy and strengthens it for resource failure or explicit background-hidden mode.

failedExperiments.result: coordinator and gateway module were absent
the first probe sampled inherited variables from WorldViewport and captured one in-flight frame before hidden pause

claimBoundary: C.5 proves only the Gateway layer split and ambient lifecycle sample.
It does not prove the C risk gate, ten-minute stability, long recording, sound, Atlas, Node or migration continuity.
The background-hidden projection is intentionally schematic but spatially and operationally distinct; it is not claimed to equal the cinematic material layer.
